passives.name: Inner Flame
passives.effects:
Every 2 rounds, gain a random {{bi|Dragon Soul}}. Additionally, increase your '''total''' {{as|attack damage}}, {{as|ability power}}, {{as|attack speed}}, {{as|'''maximum''' health}}, {{as|armor}}, {{as|magic resistance}}, and {{as|ability haste}} by 4% for each {{bi|Dragon Soul}} you possess, up to {{ap|4*6}}% at maximum souls.

Once you have obtained all 6 {{bi|Dragon Soul|Dragon Souls}}, you also gain the {{bi|Aspect of the Dragon}} buff permanently at the next phase. ''Aspect of the Dragon'' counts as an extra Soul for this effect, for a total stat increase of {{ap|4*7}}%.

effects_structured.raw: Every 2 rounds, gain a random {{bi Dragon Soul}}

Additionally, increase your '''total''' {{as attack damage}}, {{as ability power}}, {{as attack speed}}, {{as '''maximum''' health}}, {{as armor}}, {{as magic resistance}}, and {{as ability haste}} by 4% for each {{bi Dragon Soul}} you possess, up to {{ap 4*6}}% at maximum souls.
Once you have obtained all 6 {{bi Dragon Soul Dragon Souls}}, you also gain the {{bi Aspect of the Dragon}} buff permanently at the next phase
''Aspect of the Dragon'' counts as an extra Soul for this effect, for a total stat increase of {{ap 4*7}}%.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Inner Flame grants a random Dragon Soul every two Arena rounds, with each soul increasing the full listed stat package by 4% (up to six base souls).
Player-visible behavior: after collecting six souls, Aspect of the Dragon is granted on the next phase and then contributes as an additional soul-equivalent stack for the same stat amplifier.
Wiki patch-history notes include additional acquisition-round stack behavior; that late-acquisition table is not encoded yet and remains a follow-up data-fidelity opportunity.
